query:
INSERT INTO knox_documents (category, platform, ecuFamily, yearRange, fileName, fileType, fileSize, description, extractedMetadata) VALUES
('analysis', 'multi', 'TCM_Unlock', '2015-2025', 'tcm_unlock_analysis.txt', 'txt', 2500, 'TCM unlock reverse engineering: T87A, T93, Hemi. Key insight: lock is in calibration data not bootloader. One-time bench patch enables OBD flash.', 'Security flag at 0x1386. Security tables 0xA88C-0xAA37 and 0xBFF7-0xC027. 6 seed-key bypass points. 442 branch patches.'),
('reference', 'multi', 'PCM_Security', 'all', 'PCMHacking.pdf', 'pdf', 0, 'PCM Hacking reference document - security research and exploitation techniques', 'General PCM security research reference'),
('calibration', 'dodge', 'GPEC2A_5.7', '2015', 'WinOLS_15ram5.7_HPTunlock_FF680000031.ols', 'ols', 0, '2015 RAM 5.7 Hemi bench unlock - FF680000031 Micro HPTuners patched. One-time bench flash enables OBD access.', 'Bench unlock confirmed working. Calibration-level security patch.');
